heading: Placement
body:
[$https](pipe.$https) must come after the [$source](pipe.$source) stage,
may come before the [$emit](streams-agg-pipeline-emit) or [$merge](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/merge)
stage, or can serve as the final stage in a pipeline. You can use [$https](pipe.$https) in [Stream Processor Windows](atlas-sp-windows) internal pipelines.
